title: cyclophorus hastatus
intro: Cyclophorus hastatus is a species of flowering plant in the family Cyclophoridae, commonly known as the hastate cyclophorus. It is a type of medicinal plant traditionally used in Southeast Asian cultures, particularly in Malaysia and the Philippines, for its various health benefits. The medicinal properties of Cyclophorus hastatus include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties, which are derived from its alkaloids and flavonoids. The plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and its herbal preparations are believed to help alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory infections, while also promoting digestive health and reducing inflammation.
